programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: French Week

programme.title: Nature: The Bat Man of Mexico

programme.desc: Buddy and Tiny meet twin brothers with double-crests on their heads.

programme.title: Reba: The Rings

programme.title: Reba: The Vasectomy
programme.desc: Reba and Barbara Jean are furious when Brock reveals he had a vasectomy.

programme.title: Reba: Seeing Red
programme.desc: Barbra Jean transforms herself into a Reba look-alike when she dyes her hair red. Reba is hurt when she feels that Kyra is pulling away for her and growing closer to Barbra Jean.

programme.title: Reba: Terry Holliway
programme.desc: Reba and Brock take a walk down memory lane when they attend an out-of-town funeral. Back at home, Barbra Jean worries about Reba and Brock being alone together, and Cheyenne and Van get power hungry when they're left in charge of Kyra and Jake.

programme.title: Reba: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Reba pretends to be sick to get out of her Valentine's Day date with Brian, but the plan backfires when he brings chicken soup to the house.

programme.title: Reba: The Feud
programme.desc: Reba is forced to take sides when a legal battle ensues between Brock and her boss.

programme.title: Movie: Perfect Match
programme.desc: When an engaged couple can't agree on anything, the mother of the groom hires a wedding planner and an event planner to help. The two planners are as different as night and day, but they soon learn opposites do indeed attract.

programme.title: South Park: A Song of Ass and Fire
programme.desc: Black Friday is almost here and the battle for the new gaming devices is heating up. Princess Kenny’s betrayal has left Cartman out for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Titties and Dragons
programme.desc: The doors to the mall will finally open for the biggest Black Friday sale in history. The boys are divided over which gaming device to buy and a bloody battle will determine whether Xbox or Sony will be the winner.

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid
programme.desc: Kenny ends up in the foster care system after his parents are arrested.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: I'm a Little Bit Country
programme.desc: The boys join some anti-war protesters because it's a free pass out of school for the day. Meanwhile, it's the right vs. the left when the town is split between different opinions on war.

programme.title: South Park: Let Go, Let Gov
programme.desc: Carman infiltrates the NSA and doesn't like what he finds in his personal file.

programme.title: South Park: About Last Night...
programme.desc: While the country celebrates the outcome of the election, the new President-elect catches everyone off guard when he arrives at the White House prematurely.

programme.title: South Park: Obama Wins!
programme.desc: There's something in Cartman's bedroom that may change the Presidential election outcome.

programme.title: South Park: Where My Country Gone?
programme.desc: Garrison wants to build a wall to keep out all of the undocumented immigrants.

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one. When Stan refuses to vote for the ridiculous choices, Puff Daddy shows up and tells him to 'vote or die.'

programme.title: South Park: Summer Sucks
programme.desc: The entire town is gearing up for the annual Fourth of July celebration when a state-wide ban on fireworks is imposed. Jimbo and Ned cross the border into Mexico to get some Grade-A illegal fireworks.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Bobby Brown, Jimmy Kimmel & Sam Jay
programme.desc: Sam Jay has a creative solution for her girlfriend's loud TV habits, Mike Tyson tells a cryogenics employee his reproductive concerns, and Elmer takes issue with KFC's 'hats.'

programme.title: South Park: All About the Mormons?
programme.desc: A Mormon kid moves to South Park and it's up to Stan to beat him up. But when Stan and his dad meet their new Mormon neighbours, they become fascinated with how genuinely nice they are.

programme.title: South Park: Safe Space
programme.desc: Cartman is the latest victim of body shaming.

programme.title: South Park: Dances With Smurfs
programme.desc: Cartman is chosen to do the morning announcements at South Park Elementary.

programme.title: South Park: Hell on Earth 2006
programme.desc: Satan and the residents of Hell rise up on Halloween for the most raging costume party ever. However, Satan's fun is threatened by the antics of the most notorious serial killers of all time.

programme.title: South Park: Fishsticks
programme.desc: Cartman and Jimmy come up with the funniest joke of all time. When a humourless hip-hop star doesn't get the joke, he tries to bring justice to its creators.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Cow
programme.desc: Cartman's latest prank brings peace to the world.

programme.title: South Park: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs
programme.desc: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own. They convince Butters to take credit for the filth that they have written, but become jealous when he is hailed as a literary genius.

programme.title: South Park: Gluten Free Ebola
programme.desc: South Park goes gluten free.

programme.title: South Park: Eek, a Penis!
programme.desc: While Ms. Garrison is off trying to find a way to become the man he was always intended to be, Cartman is put in charge of the classroom.

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Cartman catches the mysterious Gingervitus, a disease that turns his hair red, lightens his skin and gives him freckles. Sick of being ripped-on because of his new looks, Cartman rallies all ginger kids everywhere to fight against discrimination.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Telethon

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Master Plan
programme.desc: Leslie is disappointed when her park plans are put on hold by a visit from two state auditors. April has plans for Andy at her birthday party, and Ann is putting together a romantic mystery.

programme.title: Futurama: Bend Her

programme.title: Futurama: Obsoletely Fabulous

programme.title: Futurama: In-A-Gadda-Da-Leela

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Beer Walk
programme.desc: Cleveland recruits his buddies from Quahog and Stoolbend to participate in the First Annual Charity Beer Walk. When Donna gets injured at the event, Cleveland has to take over the housework.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Murray Christmas
programme.desc: When Rallo's teacher forces him to spend the weekend at a retirement home to get to know the senior citizens during the holidays, he meets Murray, who teaches him about Hanukkah.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Ain't Nothin' but Mutton Bustin'
programme.desc: When Cleveland and Rallo take Donna's advice and spend more time together, they discover Rallo's talent for a rodeo-like sheep-riding sport called 'mutton bustin.'

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: How Do You Solve a Problem Like Roberta?
programme.desc: When Cleveland criticizes Donna's parenting skills, Donna decides to test his parenting skills on a teenage girl and leaves him to deal with Roberta by himself.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Cleveland must take matters into his own hands when Tim gets a management job at Waterman Cable and schedules a company retreat during Cleveland's Super Bowl party.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Short Story and a Tall Tale
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna celebrate Valentine's Day with a trip to Los Angeles after scoring courtside seats to the all-star basketball game. Caught up in the excitement, Cleveland gets rowdy and talks smack to the players from the sidelines.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Terry Unmarried
programme.desc: Cleveland learns that Donna never legally divorced her ex-husband, so she and Cleveland are not legally married. Then, Cleveland discovers that his best friend Terry is gay and has been dating a guy named Paul.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Blue, the Gray and the Brown
programme.desc: After Cleveland fights to save the town's drive-in, his efforts to preserve the town's history are noticed by the Stoolbend Preservation Society, which invites him to attend a private dinner party.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Way the Cookie Crumbles
programme.desc: When Cleveland sees all of his childhood possessions around town, he learns that his parents have been selling his stuff to get money after being scammed out of their life savings.

programme.title: The Office: Christening
programme.desc: When Pam and Jim's baby gets christened, Michael invites the whole office to celebrate the occasion.

programme.title: The Office: Viewing Party
programme.desc: Erin holds a 'Glee' viewing party at Gabe's house and invites the whole office over. Andy grows jealous of Gabe's relationship with Erin.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps
programme.desc: The murder of a college student takes an odd turn when Jane and Maura discover he had 32 girlfriends. Uncovering who killed him and why leads them into a world of app developers, virtual boyfriends, and relationships built on lies.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sister Sister
programme.desc: When a dog trainer is found dead at home, her champion Rottweiler is the prime suspect.

programme.desc: After a body turns up in Boston with links to another murder in Los Angeles, Jane and Maura pack up their sunscreen and hop on a plane. With the girls out of town, Angela and Korsak plan a double date with Kiki and Ron.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Entertainment for Kids and Adults
programme.desc: How to make sure what your kids are watching is safe, educational and fun; a reliable online source for all your supplement needs and more; time to chill outside with something adults can enjoy.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Something Against You
programme.desc: The team of doctors work on a high stakes case of a long time patient, adding additional pressure to an already tense environment. Meanwhile, Bailey wants Ben to kick out their new roommate.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Things We Lost in the Fire
programme.desc: As the rumor mill around the hospital continues to spiral out of control, Grey Sloan Memorial is flooded with injured firefighters from a nearby wildfire. Maggie struggles to keep things with Andrew professional at work.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Meredith is brutally attacked by a patient, and Penny is the one who discovers her. The doctors of Grey Sloan Memorial rush to stabilize Meredith and remain by her side in the harrowing aftermath.

programme.title: The Closer: Next of Kin
programme.desc: Brenda finds herself transporting a robbery suspect in a recreational vehicle driven by her parents.

programme.title: The Closer: Controlled Burn
programme.desc: A massive fire breaks out in Griffith Park and an unidentified woman's body is found in the centre of the scene. Meanwhile, Brenda and Fritz are living in a small apartment and getting on each other's nerves.

programme.title: The Closer: Speed Bump
programme.desc: The team must figure out if a hit-and-run on a recently released criminal is a murder.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Drop
programme.desc: Major Crimes finds a heavy body forty feet up a tree surrounded by loose pot when Dr. Morales shows up to the crime scene with his father. Meanwhile, Julio Sanchez works to obtain legal guardianship of Mark Jarvis while Andy Flynn prepares a surprise.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Sharon's son, Ricky, comes home for a surprise visit while Major Crimes investigates what looks like the 'follow home' murder of a retired LAPD fraud detective, who may have been murdered for an arrest she made decades ago.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Intersection
programme.desc: As the war between bikes and cars escalates, Acting Assistant Chief Fritz Howard deploys Major Crimes to solve a tragic hit and run. Lt. Provenza, frustrated by the never-ending contest to succeed Russell Traylor, contemplates retirement.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deadly Trespass
programme.desc: When a wealthy neighbor begins buying up Montana land and restricting access to the public mountain trails beyond, one man cuts the locks and ends up dead.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deerly Departed
programme.desc: A night of shooting begins in a quiet suburb, and when police speak to the man responsible they find he became unraveled over the sight of a few too many deer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fighting for Life
programme.desc: A young father allegedly murders his parents in a haze of rage and drug addiction then abandons his child and flees to the American South.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Preaching Lies
programme.desc: The leader of the religious sect The River Road Fellowship, Victor Barnard is alleged to have collected ten young girls from his congregation into a group he names 'The Maidens.' When an escapee reports his abuse to the police, he is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Family Annihilator
programme.desc: After being turned down for a promotion, Brad Bishop used a sledgehammer to brutally murder his wife, his three young sons and his own mother. Although there have been multiple sightings, Brad Bishop has evaded the authorities for over 30 years.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fugitive Mom
programme.desc: A young mother chooses to vanish with her two-year-old daughter and a serial child molester is caught in Texas, but flees his trial and begins his monstrous pattern again.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Good Wife
programme.desc: Months after their arranged marriage, a young husband from India allegedly beats his wife to death while the two work an overnight shift in the kitchen of a Maryland donut shop.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Innocence Defiled
programme.desc: The religious leader of a Hindu community in Texas flees after having been convicted of sexually abusing the children of his followers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Kidd's Treasure
programme.desc: Josh retraces the footsteps of the legendary Captain Kidd in the hopes of finding his buried treasure. From the East Coast to the Caribbean, the search takes him to a real pirate shipwreck and to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Deciphering the Last Nazi Code
programme.desc: Josh ventures into the former Third Reich in search of an elusive Nazi fortune hidden with a code allegedly created by Hitler's private secretary, and embedded into a piece of sheet music.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: LIVE
programme.desc: Hosted by Josh Gates, a live panel of experts unpacks and weighs in on the long-awaited Department of Defense and Office of the Director of National Intelligence report about Unidentified Flying Objects, recently released to Congress.

programme.title: Expedition X: Into the Alien Ocean
programme.desc: Jess and Phil's investigation into the phenomenon of unidentified submerged objects off the coast of Catalina Island intensifies after the discovery of an extraterrestrial underwater base between the island and the mainland.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: LIVE
programme.desc: Hosted by Josh Gates, a live panel of experts unpacks and weighs in on the long-awaited Department of Defense and Office of the Director of National Intelligence report about Unidentified Flying Objects, recently released to Congress.

programme.title: Expedition X: Into the Alien Ocean
programme.desc: Jess and Phil's investigation into the phenomenon of unidentified submerged objects off the coast of Catalina Island intensifies after the discovery of an extraterrestrial underwater base between the island and the mainland.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Massive Mud Home
programme.desc: Summer and Jack moved away from New Jersey after getting engaged to live off the grid. They buy a plot of land in Sedro Wooley, Washington and have commissioned Sunray Kelley to design and build their dream mud home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Pacific Coast Perch
programme.desc: Pro-builder Mark Smith is building an off-grid modular home stooped high on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. The pressure is on as even the smallest mistake can result in the home tumbling 85 feet down into the ocean.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Sweet Homestead Alabama
programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee is a renowned dermatological surgeon who is tasked with removing life-altering growths from her patients' skin so they can try to reclaim their lives.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Record Breaking Lump!
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialize. Daniel has debilitating psoriasis that covers 90 per cent of his body. Gloriana and Yolanda are a mother/daughter duo who have bonded over their bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Dr. Lee assists Ronen with the mysterious lump above his knee. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease, Sandy has a neck lump, and Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted
programme.desc: Traci's confidence has been destroyed after years of bullying from the bumps that have plagued her face for 20 years. Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Comedone Sail Away
programme.desc: JD is a gentle giant with a pear-shaped mass hanging off of his ear. David has two bumps on his neck and one on his finger that give him pain. Former cruise ship worker Julie hopes Dr. Lee can remove her large back growth so she can return to the sea.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales

programme.desc: A nighttime supercell spawns a terrifying tornado in Nashville trapping a crane operator hundreds of feet above the city, two ice climbers take an extreme risk for the ultimate reward, and the weather turns a vacation dream on the beautiful resort island.

programme.title: Top Ten Ultimate Storms
programme.desc: From the fiercest firestorm, to the most extreme nor'easter, to the storm that ate a hurricane for breakfast before, these are the most epic weather events in American history.

programme.title: Top Ten Unlucky Locations
programme.desc: With the right meteorological mix, extreme weather can strike anywhere at anytime. Its wrath appears to be random - freak conditions pop up, lash out then leave, but sometimes they come back to the same spot again and again, and these are the top ten.

programme.title: Top Ten Worst Flash Floods
programme.desc: Flash floods have the power to turn lives into nightmares. Raging walls of water barreling down rivers can sweep you off your feet, lift cars from asphalt, and wash homes from their foundations. We are counting down the top ten worst flash floods.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant becomes a one-man army when he takes on a team of court officers; the brother of a murder victim tries to get revenge in court; a defendant takes aim at a judge with a most unusual potential weapon; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A mother confronts the man responsible for her daughter's death, and a defendant attacks his own lawyer. Plus, a killer's outburst is met with extreme force.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Katie Magbanua
programme.desc: When a college professor is executed in Tallahassee, Florida, a hitman for hire scheme is suspected. The woman who allegedly helped set it up takes the stand in her own defense.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Claudia Hoerig
programme.desc: Claudia Hoerig shot her pilot husband and fled to Brazil, setting off a battle for her extradition and trial in the states. She goes under oath to convince the jury that anyone in her place would have done the same.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Todd Kendhammer
programme.desc: What seemed like a freak traffic accident soon becomes a suspected mover cover-up. Todd Kendhammer takes the stand to convince a jury that he would never hurt his wife Barbara.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Roy Oliver
programme.desc: Roy Oliver, a Dallas police officer, shot and killed Jordan Edwards, an unarmed 15-year-old. The officer takes the stand to try to explain his state of mind and convince a jury that he justifiably used lethal force.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: George Burch
programme.desc: George Burch stands accused of the brutal murder of Nicole Vanderheyden, a mother of three. He takes the stand to argue his innocence and provide the jury with an alternative suspect.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: James Scandirito
programme.desc: James Scandirito, Jr. takes to the stand to explain why he had to dismember and bury what he claims was his already-deceased father.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Lindsay Partin
programme.desc: When three-year-old Hannah Wesche dies of head trauma, Lindsay Partin, her babysitter, is indicted for her murder. She takes the stand to defend her innocence and explain statements she gave to police detectives.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Henry Segura
programme.desc: When a young mother and her children are murdered, an ex-boyfriend is charged with the killings. Henry Segura takes the stand in an attempt to convince the jury not to sentence him to death.

programme.title: American Ripper: Black Heart, White City
programme.desc: Investigating the 1893 World's Fair that turned Chicago into H. H. Holmes' killing ground, Jeff and Amaryllis discover an unexpected connection to the Ripper in the city's police archives.

programme.title: American Ripper: Blood and Bone
programme.desc: Holmes goes on the run as his schemes unravel. The investigation picks up his trail and discovers a long lost crime scene that could hold the key to proving Holmes is the Ripper.

programme.title: American Ripper: No Rest for the Wicked
programme.desc: A trove of mysterious artifacts contain an unexpected link to the UK. Investigating Holmes' capture and final days on the run, Jeff and Amaryllis uncover evidence of the Holmes curse and the shocking theory that the killer escaped his own death.

programme.title: American Ripper: The Grave
programme.desc: The investigation focuses on Holmes' execution. Speculation swirls that escaping his own death was Holmes’ last swindle. The need to exhume the killer's supposed gravesite is great, with the truth hopefully waiting below the surface.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Doomed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr take in more than they bargained for while working at a tailor shop, then convince strangers to hand over their cellphones. Plus, tonight's big loser sacrifices his childhood for a punishment three months in the making.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Staten Island Holiday Spectacular
programme.desc: The guys celebrate with some unseasonable specials, followed by new toys you may not want under the tree. Then, gift wrapping goes awry, and the big loser has a close encounter with some hungry wild life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: The guys pair up to share educational ideas with perplexed parents, then teach Krav Maga to martial arts newbies. When one joker refuses, he becomes the big loser, and faces an opponent that scares the pants off him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Space Oddity
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr offer evocative responses when taste testing new food. Plus, tonight's loser gets sent to a place far, far away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: G.I. Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers share some (mis)information on aviation, and put-pocketing turns patriotic. A double punishment goes up in flames, and Joey Fatone recaps the season.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cyber Buddies
programme.desc: Things get explosive when the guys revive some classic jokes at their own expense. Then, they go head-to-head debating nonsense in a humiliating elimination challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q get eaten alive leading a business luncheon and trip over their own feet selling running shoes. Plus Murr loses his Mommy and his dignity in a crowded retail store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Nitro Circus Spectacular
programme.desc: A live, two-hour event, featuring obstacle courses, high-flying jumps, and a punishment unlike anything you've seen before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe try to find house sitters for bizarre homes and pose as researchers studying grocery shopping habits. Later, the big loser has a run-in at the drive-thru with astonished customers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Express Lane Extreme
programme.desc: Guy Fieri puts the chefs to the test with games of extreme limitations. First, the chefs make their best chicken dish using only eight ingredients. Then, Guy asks for a regional comfort dish with a seven-ingredient limit.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Family Redemption
programme.desc: DDD Family Tournament teams who went home early are getting a duo do-over. First, Guy Fieri challenges the chefs to flip coffee and doughnuts into dinner. Then he gives the remaining DDD family duos a $22 budget to make their surf and turf dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Island Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri shares his passion for island food by inviting four island-born chefs to cook up some delightful dishes in Flavourtown. Challenges include tiny bags for picking up the ingredients required for their signature seafood dishes and blind choice.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grocery Rush
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four chefs to compete against the clock and shop for seafood dinner ingredients in a teeny-tiny basket. Then, they play a Flavortown version of musical chairs to land a must-use ingredient for a spicy takeout dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grand Reopening
programme.desc: In the finale of Flavortown Market's Grand Reopening Tournament, Guy Fieri challenges the chefs to make a comfort classic appetizer and a high-end entree using nine ingredients plus a mystery protein from Guy's son Hunter at the butcher counter.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: California Firefighters
programme.desc: After seeing the devastation of fires in California and meeting the first responders who put their lives on the line to save people and communities there, Guy Fieri has decided to bring some of those firefighting first responders to Flavortown.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Full-On Fried

programme.title: Ghost Brothers: Haunted Houseguests: Dream House Nightmare

programme.desc: When the premiere of Liv’s movie, 'Space Werewolves,' is scheduled for the same day as the beloved annual Stevens Point Cheddar-Brat Fest, Liv tries to make sure she can attend both events.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Pottery-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Because her injury prevents her from playing basketball, Maddie tries to find another hobby and focuses on trying to find out who Maddie Rooney really is. She jumps into creating pottery and tries to become the best potter ever.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Tunes and Trials
programme.desc: Austin writes a song about a girl, and after it becomes a musical sensation, fans begin to question who it’s about. In response, Val sues Austin, Ally, Trish and Dez, claiming that the song was stolen from her newest artist and the matter heads to court.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Sports and Sprains
programme.desc: It's Spirit Week at Marino High prompting Ally to write an article for the school paper and Austin to join the Varsity basketball team. But when Jimmy tells Austin to quit because he can't risk an injury, Austin ignores him and gets injured during a game.

programme.title: Jessie: Krumping and Crushing
programme.desc: Jessie enrols Luke in a dance class and to Jessie's dismay, he decides to replace doing homework with dance practice.

programme.title: Jessie: Snack Attack
programme.desc: When Jessie notices a famous casting director in the park, she tries to impress him by volunteering to help his daughter befriend the Ross kids.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Sandboy
programme.desc: Marinette finds out that a mysterious supervillain is bringing the Parisian's bad dreams.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Chameleon
programme.desc: When Lila is confronted with her own lies, she asks Hawk Moth to akumatize her. Now Chameleon, she can take on the appearance of anyone, starting with Adrien.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Substitute Cedric
programme.desc: Cedric is serving as the substitute teacher for Sofia's sorcery class at Royal Prep when a group of teen sorcerers from a rival school arrive for their annual pranking day.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Clover Time
programme.desc: When Clover’s warren gets flooded, Sofia happily invites her best friend to share her room. At first, they love living together, but they soon discover they are very different.

programme.title: Bluey: See Saw/ Movies/ Grandad
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo go on an adventure with Grandad!

programme.title: Bluey: Library/ Swim School/ Bin Night
programme.desc: Muffin plays the game of library her way. Mum, Dad and Bingo must pass Swim School. Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cupcake's Birthday/ Dog Wash Derby
programme.desc: When the plans for Cupcake’s birthday go awry, Rufus suggests that they find the perfect gift for her instead. Bob has too much to do at Playcare, so the pups gear up to help!

programme.title: Bluey: Dunny/ Duck Cake/ Handstand
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake. Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills.

programme.title: Bluey: Helicopter/ Octopus/ Baby Race
programme.desc: Bluey turns a tree stump into a game of Helicopter. Chloe tries to teach her dad to play Bluey's game. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Ikari Gozen
programme.desc: Kagami's mother gets akumatized into Ikari Gozen. Armed with her bokken, she wants to punish Kagami for disobeying her, and to lock her up forever in the giant armour that forms her body.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Timetagger
programme.desc: Ladybug and Cat Noir face Timetagger, a supervillain who has come from the future to seize their Miraculous. The future of Paris lies in their hands!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Party Crasher
programme.desc: Because of a misunderstanding, a fan of Adrien's gets akumatized into Party Crasher. Convinced that his star has made a fool of him, he is determined to get revenge.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Puppeteer 2
programme.desc: Manon becomes The Puppeteer again. And she is determined to have fun like never before in a unique playground: the wax museum.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot
programme.desc: When Tilly is mistaken for a baby, she searches the mall for a new look to reflect her maturity. Cricket persuades Bill to buy a farming robot in order to get out of chores.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Friend Con/ Flimflammed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con. Cricket stumbles into having one hundred dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Chipocalypse Now
programme.desc: Chip Whistler tears down the buildings around the Greens' house to build a new Wholesome Foods store.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Diss Track
programme.desc: Nia, Tess and Booker are ecstatic over the popularity of their Chi-Lective music video that has gotten thousands of likes on MeTube, until Levi shows them a diss track that’s been posted by a rival group.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express
programme.desc: When Levi makes a documentary to see how a person's style influences people's perception of them, he has Nia, Tess and Booker change up their style of dress which leads to surprising results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Snapped: Loretta Burroughs
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads to a disturbing discovery years later deep in his wife’s closet.

programme.title: Snapped: Michele Donohue
programme.desc: She said her husband ran away with his much younger mistress, but after years of suspicion, police find him much closer to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Tyler Block-Patton
programme.desc: When a welfare check on a local real-estate tycoon reveals a gruesome murder scene, investigators must sift through alleged drug use, revenge, and a case of mistaken identity to uncover a bombshell of a killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Alisha Noel-Murray
programme.desc: After a man is shot just a few feet inside his New York home, the ensuing investigation brings to light a murder-for-hire plot spurred by greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Uloma Curry-Walker
programme.desc: When a revered fire lieutenant is gunned down in his driveway, detectives navigate stories of a long-standing neighborhood feud and a surprise cancer scare to piece together a conspiracy plot involving young pawns manipulated by a cunning mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped: Hazelynn Stomps
programme.desc: After a woman reports that she and her husband were attacked by a pair of assailants, authorities in Oregon launch an investigation into the crime and unravel a complex scheme.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Inside Man
programme.desc: A smooth convict was offered a deal as tempting as it was dangerous: get key information from a suspected serial killer to win your freedom. The catch; he'd have to go undercover in a psychiatric prison with no guarantee of getting out alive.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: As Night Fell
programme.desc: Heidy and Conrad Truman were an enviable couple with a bright future. Then, one fateful night, Heidy was found shot and, just like that, she was gone.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Behind the Locked Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found in her locked apartment with 20-stab wounds. The Medical Examiner classifies her death as murder. But when the M.E. later changes the ruling to suicide, the decision forces her family into the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Fetish
programme.desc: First responders are called to the fatal shooting of a 28-year-old woman. Her estranged husband claims their bizarre sex game ended in suicide. Investigators and the victim's family believe this was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Missing Bullet
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of his fiancé with an apparent self-inflicted gunshot wound. Her death is ruled a suicide but authorities are puzzled when they can't find the fatal bullet. The discovery of the missing bullet turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Red Sash Death
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother is found with a red bathrobe sash knotted around her neck. Her death looks like suicide until the Medical Examiner rules homicide. The victim's 76-year-old husband is charged with murder but the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge
programme.desc: Commander Fischer updates Voight on a missing officer that Narcotics had deep undercover with a robbery crew. Burgess and Roman deal with a squatter.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Say Her Real Name
programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayal Of Trust
programme.desc: Deede Keller had a loving family, a tight circle of friends and a new man in her life. When she vanished, disturbing clues would point investigators to a suspect with a dark secret. The case provided a twist that left the courtroom astonished.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Shadow
programme.desc: The save the date cards had gone out. Angie Ver Huel went to sleep next to her fiancé, Justin Michael, with big dreams but woke up to a nightmare. Someone was running from their bedroom and Justin was dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: It was a brutal and baffling crime: a husband shot dead in his own bed. No one else in the house was hurt, not even his wife, who was sleeping beside him. Investigators were suspicious, but there were more surprises in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: When Todd Winkler was arrested for killing his wife Rachel, he claimed self-defense. Investigators learned Rachel wasn't the first Mrs. Winkler to die and traveled cross country to understand what happened on that camping trip a decade earlier.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men: Apocalypse
programme.desc: Professor X helps Raven lead a team of young mutants to stop Apocalypse, the first mutant, from destroying the world. Apocalypse has recruited a team of powerful mutants, including Magneto, to help him. The fate of Earth hangs in the balance.

programme.desc: Dr. Oakley travels to Prince Edward Island to tackle an American bison inbreeding problem.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Poking the Bear
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley performs examinations on two black bears during a dangerous relocation.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Alpacapalooza
programme.desc: The doctors are busy taking care of the rural Georgia animal population.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens Unexplained
programme.desc: Cameras capture unidentified aerial objects moving across the skies of Ukraine and a mysterious tentacle creature on the tropical beaches of St. Lucia. Experts use cutting-edge science to investigate what may be actual evidence of alien phenomenon.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: LIVE
programme.desc: Hosted by Josh Gates, a live panel of experts unpacks and weighs in on the long-awaited Department of Defense and Office of the Director of National Intelligence report about Unidentified Flying Objects, recently released to Congress.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: UFOs in the U.S.A.
programme.desc: Cameras capture lights in the night sky of the Mojave Desert and a strange object above the Oak Ridge National Laboratory in Tennessee. Experts use cutting edge tech to investigate documented UFO sightings across the US.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: LIVE
programme.desc: Hosted by Josh Gates, a live panel of experts unpacks and weighs in on the long-awaited Department of Defense and Office of the Director of National Intelligence report about Unidentified Flying Objects, recently released to Congress.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: UFOs in the U.S.A.
programme.desc: Cameras capture lights in the night sky of the Mojave Desert and a strange object above the Oak Ridge National Laboratory in Tennessee. Experts use cutting edge tech to investigate documented UFO sightings across the US.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Doomsday Mummies
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal dark secrets of the event that destroyed Pompeii.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Viking City of the Dead
programme.desc: When a mysterious Viking fortress lost underground for over a thousand years is discovered, experts investigate its buried treasures to reveal what caused the end of this fearsome civilization.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Forbidden City
programme.desc: For the first time, archaeologists use cutting-edge technology to discover what lies beneath China's Forbidden City, revealing the dark secrets of this mysterious mega-palace that have remained buried for nearly 600 years.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of Seahenge
programme.desc: A prehistoric megastructure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries to the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3-D imaging analysis, experts investigate and uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Tears For My Mother
programme.desc: A man calls 911 claiming he found his ex-girlfriend dead, and his behavior on the call leads police to wonder if he could be involved. Investigators tirelessly gather evidence to convict a killer whose unchecked rage left a young son motherless.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Blind Love
programme.desc: Thirty-one-year-old, Gabriel Montanez is found shot in a liquor store parking lot in Kalamazoo, Michigan. Two men in hooded sweatshirts are seen fleeing from the scene. Police then make a shocking discovery that leads to the truth behind the homicide.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: I Forgive You
programme.desc: In 2003, a young man in Georgia shoots his father in the head sixteen times. Days later, the dismembered body of a nun turns up on the side of a Virginia road. The story behind these two crimes haunts those involved to this day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Animal Nature
programme.desc: When a young woman is found mysteriously slaughtered on the steps of a trailer, Kenda and the homicide team must track down the vile perpetrators responsible for a horrifying string of cold-blooded murders.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: I Forgive You
programme.desc: In 2003, a young man in Georgia shoots his father in the head sixteen times. Days later, the dismembered body of a nun turns up on the side of a Virginia road. The story behind these two crimes haunts those involved to this day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda's city into a panic. Who is responsible? Just when investigators think they've got a handle on what is going on, a cryptic letter to the District Attorney's office suggests the girl isn't the only victim.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Bloody Footprint
programme.desc: Maurice Goins, a friendly neighbor who provides meals to other tenants in his apartment complex, is found murdered in his bedroom. The case goes cold, until Lakewood, Ohio police suddenly receive a tip and the investigation is thrown into overdrive.

programme.title: Home Alone: Inheriting Evil
programme.desc: CeCe Coffee is a Southern Belle with a beautiful home but very little home security. In a bizarre case of mistaken identity, she falls prey to a brutal home invasion that will force her to think on her feet if she wants to stay alive.

programme.title: Home Alone: Ex-ecutioner
programme.desc: When a single mom breaks up with her volatile boyfriend, she finds out he has other plans for her. Armed with a gun, he holds her hostage. As her life hangs in the balance, she has no idea her friend on the SWAT team is determined to save her.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Married to the Mob
programme.desc: Lee Ann discovers the dark side of her husband, gym-owner Paul, and runs for help. Alex offers a shoulder to cry on; Rocco takes her to bed. But then, Paul and she seem to work things out—until late one night, when shots ring out behind the gym.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: A playbook for Murder
programme.desc: In 2008, Sam and Mirinda Boob are the toast of the tiny town of Centre Hall, Pennsylvania. But the former cheerleader has a taste for betrayal and it sends her right into the arms of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Is War
programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Night Shift
programme.desc: A rookie cop struggles to resist temptation when he meets a beautiful exotic dancer while on shift. But he's keeping secrets not just from his sergeants but his new girlfriend too. And he'll stop at nothing to keep his double life secret.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sins of the Heart
programme.desc: Young, rich, and religious, John and Nikki Hillrich fall in love at college. It's a match made in heaven- but hell is not far off. When desire collides with faith, secret lives marked by sinful liaisons and menacing new friends shatter their perfect life.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: Sheriff deputies with a perfect marriage reveal a shocking tale of good cop/ bad cop that can only end in a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lethal Romance
programme.desc: An ambitious Harlem couple dreams of a better life for themselves. Unfortunately they're stuck in a bitter cycle of poverty poor health and mistrust leading one of them to decide to put their dreams to rest, forever.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Extreme Warriors
programme.desc: Extreme warriors are trained to live and fight in the harshest environments known to man: exposed mountaintops, extreme altitude, sub-zero temperatures, and snowstorms.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Icons of Freedom
programme.desc: Discover the secrets behind some of America's biggest icons.

programme.title: Raid on the Reactor
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the government of Israel is releasing top secret documents detailing the secret plans, strategies and implementation of their raid on the Iraqi nuclear facility in 1981, one of the most daring and successful military strikes ever.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.
