programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather are looking for a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Georgia Peach Pool Paradise
programme.desc: The Parrish family has saved their whole lives to build a tropical pool paradise in the heart of Georgia. But not everything is peachy on this build when hard soil and a complicated lazy river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Close Encounters Of The Food Kind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is hot on the trail of some otherworldly carnival eats at the UFO Festival in Roswell.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King's Peach
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the Big Fresno Fair in California, where local legend Chicken Charlie has a triple treat stacked up on a stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tacos
programme.desc: Americans love tacos, and Roger Mooking is scouring the country for the 15 best tacos around. The options for fillings range from pork to fish to alligator in hard, soft and even puffy shells.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Charleston Chowdown
programme.desc: Food Paradise chows down on the evolving food scene in Charleston, SC. Country classics like smothered catfish share the table with notable newcomers like a grilled BBQ brisket and pimento cheese sandwich and a breakfast pizza.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Street Eats
programme.desc: Diners get down and dirty with the best street food in the country, from chicken wings that defy crispiness and pizza-topped burgers to fiery hot shrimp and fresh-from-the-sea salmon tacos.

programme.desc: Jordan Andino is kicking off his night in Charlotte at Haberdish to learn the secret behind their mouthwatering fried chicken that some say is the best in the south. His next stop is at Duckworth, a former speakeasy.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Jordan Andino travels to Washington, DC, for a truly capital late-night experience. He starts his night with a cheesy pimento burger at EatBar, samples a Hong Kong sweet treat at Tiger Fork and ends at The Passenger for their famous Porchetta Sandwich.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Home Cooking
programme.desc: Roger scours the U.S. for all of the best treats from childhood, including home-cooked treats and decadent desserts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireplace Feasts
programme.desc: Roger loves cooking in a fireplace. He visits two places in New England that host fireplace feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heavy Metal Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets blown away by not one but two of the biggest metal-clad rigs he's ever seen. In Algoma, WI, he meets brothers Brad and Aric Schmiling who use a giant cinder block pit and massive metal grates to roast a whole steer.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Portland Rose Festival and Got to Be NC Fair
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe is in Portland to try beef tongue tacos. He then heads to North Carolina for a donut sloppy Joe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meadowlands State Fair/ Gardendale Magnolia Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples the freak show food of New Jersey and tries southern sweep potato pie ice cream.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Lights and Literature
programme.desc: Noah tries his hand at making a deep fried root beer float and torches a berry brulee waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burgers and Bombs
programme.desc: Start the season off right with whacky takes on some fairground classics, with The Waffle Burger and the Donut Philly Cheesesteak. 'Zanado Fries and a S'mores Cobbler round off the day.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes
programme.desc: Noah joins the crowd of the Fort Worth Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas to experience the meaty Cowboy Burrito and the Texas Juicy Lucy.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Summertime Eats

programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments

programme.desc: As the hospital deals with Meredith's trauma, Callie and Maggie perform a risky, experimental surgery on Alex's 15-year-old patient against his professional opinion.

programme.desc: A series of flashbacks recount April and Jackson's relationship. Also, a patient's progress is followed for several years.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: My Next Life
programme.desc: A patient from Meredith's very first surgery as an Intern is readmitted to Grey Sloan Memorial with a new aneurysm, and Amelia takes her case. Meanwhile, Maggie suspects that Richard knows about her relationship with Andrew.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: Meredith, Bailey, Jackson, Callie and Jo travel to a military hospital to perform an extraordinary and extremely risky surgery on a veteran with an advanced tumour. Meanwhile, back at Grey Sloan, Andrew is tired of being Maggie's worst kept secret.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Richard throws everyone for a loop when he switches the resident and attending pairings. Arizona takes a huge risk on a woman who is pregnant with quadruplets. Meanwhile, April is faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Am Not Waiting Anymore
programme.desc: Jackson learns about April's pregnancy, while Alex and the team of doctors handle an hours-long triple-organ transplant surgery. Meredith considers dating again, and Andrew insists on not receiving special treatment after he and Maggie go public.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: When It Hurts So Bad
programme.desc: Meredith takes a step forward with Will but quickly regrets it. Maggie senses a disconnection with Andrew, and Amelia re-evaluates her relationship with Owen. Meanwhile, Catherine comes into town and really shakes things up with April and Jackson.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Wear the Face
programme.desc: Meredith goes on an ambulance ride with Owen and Nathan to pick up a heart for a transplant patient. Musician & MS patient Kyle Diaz is admitted to Grey Sloan Memorial with a tremor in his hand, and the residents apply for the Preminger Grant.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: There's a Fine, Fine Line
programme.desc: After a missing child forces the hospital into lockdown, Ben decides to operate on a pregnant mother without the proper surgical equipment.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Justice Denied
programme.desc: Patty and Jerry Wetterling got a phone call in 1989 saying their son had been taken by an unknown abductor. For the past 25 years, new leads have come and gone, but they still await answers in his disappearance. Plus, scammers in Hawaii are on the run.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Burning Rage
programme.desc: Jennifer Puente is on the loose after allegedly torturing and setting her friend Moriah Gonzales on fire with her boyfriend Joe Alvarado.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Sweet Homestead Alabama
programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Mississippi Mayhem (Part 1 of 2)
programme.desc: In Mississippi, the Raneys must first solve the mystery of flooding water before teaching a family of six to thrive off-grid together. Builds include a new Elvis-inspired 'Heartbreak Goat-tel' goat pen, garden compound and metal forge.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Mississippi Mayhem (Part 2 of 2)
programme.desc: The Raney's must solve a flooding water mystery before teaching a Mississippi family of six to thrive off-grid. Builds include a new Elvis-inspired 'Heartbreak Goat-tel' goat pen, garden compound and metal forge.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: A Golden Opportunity
programme.desc: The Raneys rescue the Kramers in Alaska by converting an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen. But when Marty is suddenly forced to quarantine, Matt and Misty must finish alone, leading to the discovery of the homestead's biggest resource: gold.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Timber Frame House
programme.desc: A New York couple with a passion for snowboarding begins building a smart timber frame cabin in remote Vermont. Troubles soon begin when the home's instructions lead to confusion, making this dream nearly impossible to finish before the harsh winter hits.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: A Golden Opportunity
programme.desc: The Raneys rescue the Kramers in Alaska by converting an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen. But when Marty is suddenly forced to quarantine, Matt and Misty must finish alone, leading to the discovery of the homestead's biggest resource: gold.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Timber Frame House

programme.title: Shipwreck Men: Bahama Drama

programme.title: Shipwreck Men: Hurricane Alley
programme.desc: Hurricane Isaac blasts South Florida leaving wreckage and destruction for most, but gold for salvagers. High winds and an eleven-foot surge test the courage of these hardened men as they throw caution to the wind, risking it all to beat the competition.

programme.title: Shipwreck Men: A Mess in the Marquesas
programme.desc: A holiday weekend turns tragic as Atlantis races into action. The job of a lifetime could go bust, sinking Downrite's reputation. For Fast Response, a mistake could cost them the job. And the Arnold's struggle with a risky salvage and Ricky Sr.'s health.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredge of Insanity
programme.desc: Kris attempts to save his season with a move that may be his worst idea yet. Shawn hunts for a pay-streak to solidify his position at the top. Emily prospects a claim to call her own. Vern tries out a 'crazy' new diver. Zeke sets sail on an adventure.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Once Upon a Mine
programme.desc: Nome's King Shawn edges closer to his goal of ultimate domination. Knight Kris tries his hand on an excavator dredge. Queen Emily has a pump crisis that could end her season. Wizard Zeke returns to Cape Rodney while Ogre Vernon leans on his last diver.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Good Man Down
programme.desc: To help boost production, Dave gives gold room operator Jesse Goins the opportunity he's been waiting for, to become a first-time rock truck driver. But all work stops when the crew faces a sudden and unimaginable tragedy.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of teammate Jesse Goins, the crew struggles to mine with one man down. When Dave comes under fire from the team about the lack of access to the gold-rich Hummocks, he heads off for a do or die showdown with the local community.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Enter the Promised Land
programme.desc: The team finally gains access to the potential motherlode in the Hummocks. But as soon as the crew begins, Box Creek is hit by a huge snow storm and Jason makes an alarming discovery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Winter's Warning
programme.desc: Team Turin races to smash their 400-ounce season goal in Hummocks gold. But the increasing amounts of heavy black sand, early snow and pressure from the local community threaten to derail their operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Dave returns to the Doodlebug Cut in hopes of beating their 400-oz season goal. But when the channel they're mining is lost, Dave tracks down the son of an old-timer who gives him a lead that could send them over the top.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Million Dollar Gamble

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes

programme.desc: As the Kardashian Cuban vacation continues, Kim’s commitment to her work engagements on Mother’s Day stirs up a disagreement. Meanwhile, Scott comes down with a major case of FOMO, and Kim tries to resolve the tension over Kylie’s Puma endorsement.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby's DMV Appointment
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff and Food Network's Curtis Stone aim to knock their friend Bobby Flay down a couple of pegs. Washington D.C. veteran Todd Gray and Maryland's French-trained Gabonese caterer Serge Pambo go head to head.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: To Contend and Serve!
programme.desc: Naval chef Carla Harris brings her grit against seriously competitive chef Noah Schwartz, while Anne Burrell of Worst Cooks in America, and The Kitchen's Geoffrey Zakarian use their expertise to determine who has the arsenal to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Poking and Prodding
programme.desc: Judy Gold teams up with Katie Lee for the chance to poke fun at their dear friend Bobby Flay. Alex Stratta and Houman Gohary compete with the hopes to take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sour With The Sweet
programme.desc: Barbecue fusion master Robert Cho and over-the-top Brian Malarkey are hungry for a win. Food Network's Sunny Anderson and chef Josh Capon will be serving one of them up to Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fields of Green
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Irish firecracker Chef Maeve Rochford squares off against Indian cuisine enthusiast Chef Navjot Arora.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Finding Stars
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis and People Magazine's Jess Cagle reach for the stars when they match up Atlanta's dynamic Greek chef Pano Karatassos and New York City's Mimi Weissenborn to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: The summer heat wave takes hold of the kitchen, and Chef Carla Hall tries to beat the heat with TV announcer Steve Higgins. They recruit red-hot chefs Kathy Sidell and Vinson Petrillo to light a fire under Bobby Flay and take him out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Forecasting a Win
programme.desc: America's favourite weatherman, Al Roker, joins Food Network's Katie Lee to bring a torrential downpour on Bobby Flay's day. Chefs Maris Grubb and Justin Walker will be cooking up a storm to try to rain on Bobby's parade.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: When Todd Winkler was arrested for killing his wife Rachel, he claimed self-defense. Investigators learned Rachel wasn't the first Mrs. Winkler to die and traveled cross country to understand what happened on that camping trip a decade earlier.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Connection
programme.desc: They were bright young women out for a little fun with their friends. Kenya Monge and Lydia Tillman didn't know each other but they would be forever related, both falling prey to a smooth-talking stranger with a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Indiscretion
programme.desc: It was a violent and bizarre crime scene: #1 scrawled next to the lifeless body. The victim’s boyfriend had an alibi and the case went cold. Then, a DNA hit. But investigators couldn’t figure out the link between two people separated by 1,500 miles.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Weinberger was a successful surgeon hiding a secret from his medical staff and from his adoring wife. There was a malpractice suit and a death. Then the doctor vanished, sparking an international manhunt and a family's fight for justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vanished
programme.desc: Young nursing student Michelle Le had disappeared. Something drew her out to her car. As her loved ones launched a very public effort to find Michelle, investigators began their own methodical search.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at a trash facility, a detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know she will come face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Professional Suspect
programme.desc: When a loving mother and wife is found shot in her own bed, investigators know they are dealing with a homicide. The case goes cold for two years until two determined detectives set their sights on justice and reveal a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Two Fires, One Victim
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is found burning in the woods just off the side of the road, investigators are left wondering not only who she is, but who could have done this to her. They follow a trail of fire, fury, and falsities to get to the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: A Helpful Witness
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Cold Justice Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold. 33 years later, local detectives take the baton from Kelly Siegler and the Cold Justice team only to find that obtaining a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get Back to Even

programme.title: Murders at the Boarding House: Special, Part 2

programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Plague on Hell Island
programme.desc: A strange sea fortress that guards icy waters is home to a grim secret. Experts investigate the mysteries at this eerie structure, which fought an invisible enemy far more deadly than ever imagined.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Death Fortress
programme.desc: A desert island adrift in the Gulf of Mexico contains a massive and marooned structure with a contagious past. Experts investigate and uncover a desolate military fortress turned prison and plagued by a deadly disease.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Ancient Alien Computer
programme.desc: An ancient piece of corroded metal is more than it seems. An alien-looking device of intricate dials and cogs. Using cutting-edge imaging technology, experts examine what could actually be a 2,000-year-old computer.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Ancient Alien Computer
programme.desc: An ancient piece of corroded metal is more than it seems. An alien-looking device of intricate dials and cogs. Using cutting-edge imaging technology, experts examine what could actually be a 2,000-year-old computer.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Death Fortress
programme.desc: A desert island adrift in the Gulf of Mexico contains a massive and marooned structure with a contagious past. Experts investigate and uncover a desolate military fortress turned prison and plagued by a deadly disease.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Search for Alien Earths
programme.desc: Astronomers and researchers are on the hunt for the groundbreaking discovery that confirms extraterrestrial life. Using state-of-the-art technology like the Kepler telescope, scientists examine thousands of exoplanets in search of another Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Stranger Signals From Alien Worlds
programme.desc: For decades, researchers have been scouring the universe for signals from extraterrestrials. New discoveries reveal mysterious fast radio bursts from space that may be the key to confirming life in the cosmos.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Expedition Extraterrestrial
programme.desc: Scientists on the hunt for extraterrestrial life suspect that it might be closer than we think: our very own solar system. Using the latest discoveries, experts might at last confirm that our neighbors might harbor alien life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Alien Earths
programme.desc: New discoveries of alien earths reveal vital clues in finding extraterrestrial life, using the latest science and technology, experts reveal the strange landscapes and oceans of these distant worlds.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Hunt for the Mars Aliens
programme.desc: NASA's brand-new Mars rover is on the hunt for alien life, and with the help of cutting-edge engineering, scientists embark on a search for fossilized remains.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mars's Alien Secrets
programme.desc: Experts are rethinking everything they know about the Red Planet, now that the latest NASA missions to Mars might finally reveal if it is home to alien life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Alien Hell Storms
programme.desc: Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune are homes to the deadliest storms in our solar system, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of this hellish alien weather, helping experts understand these alien worlds better than ever.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Tragedy Comes in Pairs
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice in the desert town of Socorro, New Mexico, when Crystal Houston is found murdered just 14 months after her older sister, Stephanie, is killed in a suspicious accident.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Philly Fallout
programme.desc: The building of a backyard shed destroys a years long, close relationship between two neighbors and ignites a vicious conflict that sees property destroyed, pets killed, and finally two people shot to death in cold blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Law and Disorder
programme.desc: A former cop moves into a close-knit neighbourhood. Conflict soon arises with the whole community over dogs, noise, and other disturbances that keep piling on and ratcheting up until a boiling point is reached, guns are drawn, and blood is spilled.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Flash Point
programme.desc: When life becomes a powder keg, these morally bereft women light the sparks.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Law and Disorder
programme.desc: A former cop moves into a close-knit neighbourhood. Conflict soon arises with the whole community over dogs, noise, and other disturbances that keep piling on and ratcheting up until a boiling point is reached, guns are drawn, and blood is spilled.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Flash Point
programme.desc: When life becomes a powder keg, these morally bereft women light the sparks.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Bugs Bunny Defense
programme.desc: A woman claims she accidentally shot her husband when they were re-enacting a moment from a Bugs Bunny cartoon.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Chowchilla Kidnapping
programme.desc: Abducted by masked gunmen and buried alive in a truck trailer underground, 26 innocent school children spent 28 hours held hostage in the dark before they made a harrowing escape.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: To Catch a Killer: The Monkey on My Back
programme.desc: A chance meeting causes New York State Police Investigator Jim Horton of befriend infamous burglar Gary Evans.

programme.title: Disappeared: California Leaving
programme.desc: Former Harlem Globetrotter Rico Harris is driving from LA to Seattle and mysteriously vanishes. When his car is found abandoned in a remote area, investigators and his loved ones embark on a journey that grows more baffling as time passes.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Stop
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tabitha Tuders vanishes walking to her bus stop in Nashville, TN. Police think she's a runaway but it appears that there are disturbing circumstances behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Deadly Message
programme.desc: A young man who overcame a devastating brain injury enters a taxi and never resurfaces. Police are at a loss until they receive a mysterious text that pivots the case in a new direction and intensifies the race to bring Julian Williams home alive.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: CSI Slay
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman is brutally murdered in her home. The NYPD follows a trail of complicated forensic clues to unravel the truth about who killed her, until a shocking discovery reveals that her murder is not what it seems.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Portrait of a Killer
programme.desc: A teenager said after he killed an elderly couple that 'it felt amazing.' Now a controversial law could set him free at age 25.

programme.title: Predator at Large: We're Talking About A Serial Killer
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman and her infant son vanish on a walk to their local corner store, the close-knit town of Deerfield Beach is terrified. When the woman turns up dead, the community is convinced that they have a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: In Case of Murder
programme.desc: The untimely death of Melissa Henderson, wife and mother of two, rattles a small Indiana town -- but revelations of foul play at her funeral set the rumor mill ablaze. Local gossip leads investigators to a riverboat casino with unexpected suspects.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Only if There's Something in It for Me
programme.desc: While being questioned in the abduction of an Anchorage barista, a young local businessman starts negotiating with investigators to reveal details of a depraved secret life as one of America's most meticulous and psychopathic serial killers.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Voice from the Grave
programme.desc: Dancer Stephanie Bruner walks out on her husband during a Colorado blizzard and is never seen alive again. When search parties find her body in a river, the manhunt changes to a murder investigation.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.desc: In every theatre of war, long-range weaponry gives you the ability to reach out and touch your opponent while staying out of harm's way. It's a critical edge that can be the difference between victory and defeat.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: The Indestructibles
programme.desc: When it comes to military hardware, tough is what keeps you alive. Take a look at the toughest military hardware on the planet.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surgical Strikers
programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate

programme.title: El Chapo: Caught!
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera aka El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the US marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Retreat Pool
programme.desc: A mountain lodge with incredible views is missing one thing: a pool. Brian and Paul Porter weather rain storms to give a family an amazing outdoor living area featuring a spa with a walk-up bar, swim jets and a fire basin.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rocky Road to Backyard Bliss
programme.desc: A Nashville family is ready for Kyle and Justin to build the perfect pool in their backyard. The project gets off to a rocky start, but the Poll Kings deliver a phenomenal backyard complete with a massive waterfall and beautiful pavilion.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Eyesore to Elegance
programme.desc: After renovating a fixer-upper into their dream home, a couple is ready to add the final touch by restoring the old pool. Paul and Brian Porter create a modern oasis by adding an infinity edge spa, fire bowls and a luxury barbecue area.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Partygoers Pool
programme.desc: The Caviness family build spectacular over-the-top pools.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountaintop Luxury Lagoon
programme.desc: The Leasure family's new house in the hills above Folsom, CA, comes with breathtaking lakeside views, and their big pool dreams will make it a perfect home. But rocky soil and tricky plumbing designs create a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Caribbean Spa
programme.desc: With three energetic kids and lots of friends, a family needs a pool to keep everyone entertained. They create a masterpiece that includes a huge deck for Dad, a Baja shelf for Mom and multiple water features.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Country Store and Gas Station
programme.desc: The crew heads to Grottoes, Virginia, to salvage and demolish an old country store. Using materials from the project, Mike and Robert create a tribute bench for a veterans' retreat.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Deck Fit For Fun
programme.desc: A couple's home in Parker, Colorado, needs a major deck overhaul to take advantage of the incredible views of the Rocky Mountains and downtown Denver. A huge budget allows the Mega Decks crew to design deck like no other.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Texas Transformation in Port Aransas
programme.desc: A woman and her kids have been vacationing in Port Aransas, TX, for years and are ready to own a piece of their favorite paradise.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Living Large on Long Island, New York
programme.desc: A couple looks for a cozy beach home in the North Fork of Long Island, New York, for their family of six to enjoy throughout the year. They find a diamond in the rough and have big plans to update the look and transform it into a bright, welcoming space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Oceanfront Oasis
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts Nick and Krystin are looking for an oceanfront property in Jacksonville Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Harlem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Harlem, a vibrant New York City neighborhood with a diverse cross-section of cultures. He highlights its colorful restaurants offering soul food, Caribbean classics, and even the national dish of Senegal.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Krakow
programme.desc: From peasant food to royal snacks, Andrew reveals what makes the food scene in Krakow, Poland, so delicious. The city's edible symbols take the form of pierogis, hearty stuffed cabbage rolls and whole-roasted pork knuckle.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Independent Lens: The People vs. Agent Orange

programme.title: Breaking Big: Danai Gurira

programme.title: Movie: His Double Life
programme.desc: Five years after her husband dies, a woman is remarried to her deceased husband's business partner. Her daughter discovers that he is having an affair, and the following day, the mysterious other woman also turns up dead.

programme.title: Movie: Mile High Escorts
programme.desc: Following the death of a co-worker, a young woman working for a private airline learns the owner's secret and becomes the next target.

programme.title: Movie: Burning Little Lies
programme.desc: A woman falls for a handsome firefighter after he rescues her from a suspicious car crash. But her life spins into a deadly affair after his seemingly overprotective behavior burns through her life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Guide to Love
programme.desc: Reusing funeral flowers for a date, redoing bedrooms with used hotel sheets, buying thrift store lingerie or planning vow renewals for almost nothing, 'Extreme Cheapskates Guide To Love' shows that love doesn't have to cost a thing.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: Cooking instructor Ron Maestri shows us how to cook for lobster taste on a tunafish budget. Rocker Goldy Locks converted an abandoned hospital into her home, for just the fraction of the price.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Angel/ Mark
programme.desc: Although she's eight months pregnant, Angel frequents local junkyards on a regular basis with her husband Orlando. Mark lives in Las Vegas and yet he manages to not spend a penny of his full time salary.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper
programme.desc: Jamie's entire garden is made up solely of silk flowers. Now, she aims to replace her whole lawn with artificial grass, to eliminate her landscaping bill. Justin tries to land a job in sales, where he promises to save his employer tons of dough.

programme.title: So Freakin Cheap: Rather Die Than Pay Retail
programme.desc: The Trans try to help their youngest daughter pursue her modeling dream in their own frugal fashion. The Watsons are planning their daughter's wedding on a $750 budget. The Guileses are trying to renovate their 100-year-old house as cheaply as possible.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rattled
programme.desc: A snake bite victim may die in the ER when life-saving anti-venom isn't available; a mother is near death after having a C-section and doctors are torn over treatment options.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: A man has a snapping turtle clamped to his neck, and it will not let go. As a hurricane closes in, an ER doctor rushes to get all the patients out. A man is impaled by a chainsaw while trimming trees twenty feet high.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Epi
programme.desc: A patient arrives with paralysis in her legs, which spreads up to her arms. An ATV crushes a boy and the hospital doesn't have the right tools to help him. A doctor accidentally injects herself with epinephrine.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Couch Creature
programme.desc: A woman believes her neighbours want to kill her; a man is near death after an arrow pierces his chest; two women with swollen abdomens refuse to explain the cause of their pain.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Sleepover Nightmare
programme.desc: A young boy at a sleepover party mysteriously loses control over his arms and legs; a woman is shot in the leg at her own bachelorette party, but claims not to know who did it; bubbles in a woman's arteries are causing a stroke.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Heeled!
programme.desc: A man is impaled in his abdomen by a stiletto heel. A seemingly healthy outdoorsman has a series of seizures that baffle his doctors. Two patients make their doctor suspicious when they both complain about identical headaches that started during sex.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Nose No Bounds
programme.desc: April is covered in bumps that have disfigured her arms. Genner has flown all the way from the Philippines to have Dr. Lee help with his bumpy nose. Chris suffers from psoriasis that nearly covers his body and a bump on his head.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Movie: Hancock
programme.desc: An alcoholic superhero, that alienates the public as he saves their lives, has a chance encounter with a public relations person.

programme.title: Sell This House!: Runaway Roswell Realtors
programme.desc: James and Lyn purchased their Roswell, Georgia house 30 years ago, raised three sons, and know it's time to move on. Six realtors have refused to list the home unless serious changes are made. Still, the couple is resistant to making any updates.

programme.title: America's Top Dog: Premiere Pooches

programme.title: America's Top Dog: Cute But Means Business

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Two former best friends face off in court, and a cold-blooded murderer addresses his victim's family. Plus, a judge says the wrong thing at the wrong time to the wrong person.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge scolds a reckless driver who shut down an interstate, and a family faces their daughter's killer: their son-in-law.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men Origins: Wolverine

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man

programme.title: Movie: Blended
programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, two single parents are horrified to learn that they're sharing a suite at a resort for families where they've taken their respective kids on holiday.

programme.desc: For Jay's birthday, Gloria gives him the best surprise: a romantic getaway to Hawaii. The only kicker is she invited the entire family to come along. Everyone arrives at the airport, and it's quite a scene, filled with forgotten IDs and flying phobias.

programme.title: Modern Family: Hawaii
programme.desc: A relaxing family vacation in Hawaii gets slightly derailed when everyone has their own idea of fun.

programme.title: Modern Family: Family Portrait
programme.desc: Claire painstakingly plans for a new family portrait to be taken, but it seems like everything and everybody is working against her. Gloria and Manny go with Phil and Alex to a Lakers game and end up having a very awkward moment on the jumbotron.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Wagon
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old station wagon, but not before everyone takes it on one last ride down memory lane. Meanwhile, when Mitchell decides to build a life-sized princess castle for Lily, Cameron calls in Jay for support.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Kiss
programme.desc: Gloria decides to cook more traditional Colombian meals, which is met with some ribbing from Jay. Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mom when she learns that Alex likes a boy.

programme.title: Modern Family: Earthquake
programme.desc: An earthquake hits, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with the plumber. Manny experiences an existential crisis while out with Jay, while Mitchell and Cameron use the quake as a way to get out of a brunch party.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers on a Treadmill
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell help each other spare their significant others from embarrassment. Jay goes to a Quinceañera to prove a point to Gloria, and Haley gives sisterly advice to Alex.

programme.title: Modern Family: Unplugged
programme.desc: Noticing that everyone is too busy on their electronic devices to actually interact with one another, Claire and Phil declare a family challenge to see who can stay unplugged the longest.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween

programme.title: Modern Family: Chirp
