programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old to New
programme.desc: Guy's in for some old school favourites and new school stunners.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multitaskers
programme.desc: A Greek diner is decked out in neon and servin' up family recipes like Yia Yia's grape leaves. In Oxnard, Calif., the jack of all trades joint is baking, brewing and cooking all in the same restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Things New York
programme.desc: Guy's gets a taste of New York in and out of the Big Apple, including Eureka, California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old School Joints
programme.desc: Guy gets a taste of yesteryear. In Duluth, an Italian market/restaurant is stacking up hearty homemade lasagna and a monster muffaletta. In Eugene, Ore., DDD's first all-vegan spot serves their signature tofu sammy and frozen peanut butter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Pork, Poke and Pollo
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to Houston, where he checks out the rotisserie pork at a Greek diner. A poke place in Kahului, HI, is dishin' out fresh fish and turning up the heat on tako, and a Mexican joint in San Francisco makes it all from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Day Dining
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy gets a taste of every meal. In Long Beach, California, he's served some delicious short ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Only Oranges
programme.desc: It's all about oranges, the magic factor in some of Ina's favourite recipes.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Ina Garten showcases incredible desserts, including a decadent chocolate cake with mocha frosting, sophisticated prunes in armagnac and a crazy-delicious salted caramel sundae with peanut-caramel popcorn and rich chocolate sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fireworks of Flavor
programme.desc: Fourth of July is sparkling with fireworks of flavour from Sunny Anderson's steak supreme to Jeff Mauro's cheesy and spicy Reuben-style brats. Katie Lee makes grilled firework onion appetizers and Michael Symon grills blueberry BBQ chicken.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Parm and Polenta Cake Make Everything Better
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his grilled eggplant parmesan outdoors on the grill and whips up a classic accompaniment with salami and provolone, antipasti salad with campfire dressing.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Ranching Out with Ribs and Corn
programme.desc: Michael Symon turns the flavors of ranch dressing into a rub for Ranch-Rubbed Pork Ribs. He also uses it in Baked Sweet Potatoes with Charred Onion Ranch Dip. Michael's wife, Liz, makes Grilled Corn with Ranchovy Butter, featuring the rub yet again.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Summer Celebration
programme.desc: It's all about summer celebrations in Ree Drummond's ranch kitchen. She starts by making customizable roasted brisket sliders and a big grilled veggie salad, followed by a lemon and berry icebox cake and fizzy sparkling sangria.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboys Who Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is delivering a tailgate lunch to her husband, Ladd, and the cowboys who are out working cattle. She makes Pressure Cooker Pulled Pork Sandwiches and Pickled Jalapenos and Onions for topping them.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Chicken Lovers
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro unearths the best chicken recipes from all the hosts and shares his Alabama White BBQ chicken sandwich. Katie Lee Biegel sets sail with chicken parmesan zucchini boats, and pitmaster Moe Cason stops by to share his Memphis-style chicken.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: All-American Clambake
programme.desc: Michael Symon is celebrating the holiday weekend with an All-American clambake with sweet potatoes and corn. Michael also makes his smoked chicken wings to push this festive meal over the top.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Old-School Vegas
programme.desc: Reminiscing over smoky steakhouses and hearty red sauce joints, Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to prepare an old-school Las Vegas meal fit for the Rat Pack.

programme.title: The Grill of Victory: A Day on the Grill
programme.desc: Host Sabin Lomac challenges three amateur backyard grilling wizards to make breakfast, lunch and dinner on the grill. The competitors have to handle curveballs like making a lunchtime salad trio and a stuffed entree for dinner.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: BBQ Hacks
programme.desc: A true Master of 'Cue must have the ability to handle any challenge or cooking condition, so the competitors have to prove their ability to pivot. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson keep a close eye on their pitmasters.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games, Part 2
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's summer grilling tournament continues with only seven GGG winners remaining. It's all about the boardwalk as the chefs make summer seafood dishes and spicy seaside sandwiches.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games Part 3
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's Summer Grillin' Games continue, this time with carnival-themed games and dishes. Guy gives the chefs a funnel cake-sized twist by putting them in pairs to make a fried sweet-and-savoury duo and a cheesy carnival classic.

programme.desc: Jackson guides a defeated couple and their cat who has been locked away for over a year. He visits a "Cat-Bassador" who works with his guardian to help special needs cats find forever homes. And Jackson visits an incredible prison program.

programme.title: Embarrassing Pets: Pup Paranoia
programme.desc: Owners of a dog paralyzed by the great outdoors are determined to help him overcome his extreme phobia. A pug is treated her very pungent problem, and a family is at a loss when it comes to their petulant parrot's aggressive behavior.

programme.title: Embarrassing Pets: Menacing Marley
programme.desc: At the clinic, a mutt called Marley is wreaking havoc at home and her owners are in desperate need of conquering the chaos. Later, Dr. Gavin handles a smelly shih-tzu, and animal behaviourist Caroline meets a very demanding duck called Charlie.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wild Dogs on the Move
programme.desc: A trio of rare Dhole canines are prepared to make their cross-country journey to the zoo, and keepers anxiously await their arrival. A tinamou chick must be hand-reared, while a specialized tool is welded to extract a tusk from a charming Babirusa.

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.title: The Zoo: Cougar Cub Rescue
programme.desc: A trio of abandoned puma cubs arrives at the zoo, while the staff grows concerned that Ella, the oldest rhino, is not acting herself. Meanwhile, a Caribbean flamingo is born at the zoo after nearly two decades, and Otto the stallion makes his debut.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date
programme.desc: The zoo opens an endangered turtle species facility, while Malayan tigers Suhanna and Rimba struggle to breed, because Rimba seems disinterested. Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar herd eagerly await the arrival of new calves.

programme.title: Movie: Fist Fight
programme.desc: After mild-mannered high school teacher Andy gets his colleague Ron fired, Ron challenges him to a fight after school. As Andy looks for ways to get out, news of the fight spreads. Andy realizes he will have to toughen up and rise to the challenge.

programme.title: Movie: A Madea Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Jumping the Broom

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a beautiful garden turns into a dark abyss, the serenity in Salem, Oregon is shattered. All is not as it seems as investigators dig into the life of a single mom. As the grisly details begin to unfold, the chase is on to catch a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard
programme.desc: A mom and her newborn inexplicably vanish from their California home. When blood is discovered in their backyard, a grieving father is scrutinized and investigators race against the clock to bring this mother and child home before it's too late.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally
programme.desc: A land developer disappears into the Arizona desert, and a brother sets out to uncover the truth. But when hikers stumble onto a gruesome discovery, investigators quickly realize no one can be trusted when they find themselves in the line of fire.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk
programme.desc: A horrific discovery in a backyard cornfield is just the beginning of an unspeakable scene. As horrors unfold in this small, Midwest town, someone is playing a deadly game of cat and mouse and it will be years before a ghastly truth is revealed.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: In the Dark of Night
programme.desc: The joy of Christmas looks bright for a doting Oklahoma Mom. But her kids wake up to a living nightmare when she's inexplicably gone. As investigators track two suspects down a deceitful road, an incendiary break lures the killer out of the dark.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: When Hell Freezes Over
programme.desc: When the car of a Southern California girl is found abandoned, investigators spend years and travel hundreds of miles trying to solve her mysterious disappearance. Finally, an unimaginable backyard discovery by drug agents leads to a vicious killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Mistake
programme.desc: A bizarre trail from South Dakota to Minnesota ends in a dark discovery and a case gone cold. While investigators question whether a man of God is the key to solving this mystery, they fear blind faith is not only risky, but could prove to be deadly.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A deadly mystery with deep running roots snakes through a small Alabama town, shattering a young family and baffling the community. Investigators unlock long held Southern secrets to solve a murder and discover a truth steeped in blood and revenge.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Last Call
programme.desc: An unsuspecting field worker makes a horrifying discovery in a backyard orchard and detectives chase down deadly clues. But when a savage killer slips through the cracks, innocent lives are threatened and solving this case is suddenly in jeopardy.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: When a construction worker unearths some human remains in the backyard of an old farmhouse, it sets off a baffling fifteen-year missing person's case and leaves detectives searching for long buried secrets and overdue justice.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Guilt Or Innocence
programme.desc: When the body parts of two missing teens are found in a backyard cornfield, Ohio detectives uncover dark family secrets to track their suspect. The community fears there may never be justice when the man convicted of the crime is released from prison.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: The House on Canyon Road
programme.desc: The gruesome discovery of a skeletonized and dismembered corpse buried in the backyard of a Seattle home results in an investigation that unravels a 30-year-old murder plot hatched by a scheming, vindictive family.

programme.title: Dateline: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: Hannah Hill disappeared from her home in Akron, Ohio in the spring of 1999. One week later Hannah's body was found in the trunk of her own car on the side of the road.

programme.title: Dateline: The Farm
programme.desc: A murder outside of Pleasantville, Iowa divides a family and forces one man to take the investigation into his own hands.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Detour
programme.desc: Diane McIver was a successful businesswoman who enjoyed a lavish lifestyle with her husband. Then she was gone. It was a mystery riddled with privilege and power, but investigators needed to answer a crucial question: was this an accident or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What They Saw
programme.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the unthinkable, the brutal murder of their mother. The prosecution's case would be built around what they thought those kids observed, but was another version of events possible?

programme.title: Exhumed: Cold Case, Unearthed
programme.desc: Marilyn McIntyre's gruesome murder goes unsolved for decades, until a phone call resurrects the investigation. Is it possible evidence is buried with the victim? After thirty years underground, does it still exist?

programme.title: Exhumed: Mail Order Murder
programme.desc: An unconventional love story ends in murder when a mail-order bride disappears without a trace. Detectives discover that someone closest to her has a suspicious past, and only an exhumation can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Exhumed: Evil Deception
programme.desc: Weeks from giving birth, Meg Purk is found dead in her home of an apparent suicide. Did Meg really kill herself and her unborn baby, or is the truth more horrible than anyone can imagine? It will take an exhumation to unearth the truth.

programme.title: Exhumed: A Murderer Among Us
programme.desc: When grandmother Erma Prince dies after a simple hip surgery, fears spread that a killer nurse could be responsible. The police do everything they can to track down the killer including exhuming Erma's body.

programme.title: Exhumed: Bones of Truth
programme.desc: Mystery shrouds the disappearance of wife and mother Danna Dever. Could the discovery of skeletal remains in a California prairie be the key to finding out what happened? An exhumation might just reveal the truth.

programme.title: Exhumed: Deadly Generosity
programme.desc: A year after Diana Burrow died of natural causes, a rumor began to spread in the small town of St. Pauls, NC that Diana was murdered. With no evidence obtained from the crime scene, officials have little to investigate unless they exhume her body.

programme.title: Exhumed: Poison in the Plot
programme.desc: A beloved wife finds her husband dead of an apparent suicide by poisoning. Suspicious detectives must exhume the body of her first husband to unearth the truth and discover a diabolical plot devised by a lovelorn 'Black Widow.'

programme.title: Movie: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gump Roast
programme.desc: Friends, family and enemies gather to roast Homer, recalling his escapades over the years.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror
programme.desc: The Simpsons move into a haunted house that was built on a Native burial ground.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror II
programme.desc: Lisa, Bart and Homer eat too much candy and end up having three horrible nightmares.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror VII
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa find Bart's demented twin brother; Lisa's develops a higher form of life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror IX
programme.desc: Homer is possessed by a recently executed convict after using his scalp as a toupee.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XV
programme.desc: Ned can see the future; Mr. Burns' body is explored; Lisa becomes a new Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIV
programme.desc: Homer rides around Springfield wreaking havoc as 'The Fat in The Hat' in a rhyming Dr. Seuss-ian tale. In 'Dead and Shoulders,' Bart is beheaded during a kite accident and his head is attached to Lisa's body.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXX
programme.desc: Three stories of horror feature a demon Maggie, a mission to rescue Milhouse from another dimension, dead-Homer's spirit trying on some new bodies for size and Selma finally finding love in an unlikely place: the alien in the basement.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: During a trip to 'Dizzneeland' the Simpsons board the wrong ride, Rocket To Your Doom, and are transported through the galaxy to Kang and Kodos’ home planet, where they are held captive at the local zoo.

programme.title: Family Guy: Movin' in (Principal Shepherd's Song)
programme.desc: Principal Shepherd moves in with the Griffins after he is fired for fat-shaming Chris at school. Meanwhile, Brian sues Stewie for writing a series of children's books which portray him as an idiot.

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode
programme.desc: Tired of not winning an Emmy, Peter embarks on his own For Your Consideration campaign for Family Guy by making the show more like Emmy-winning shows and no category is off limits.

programme.desc: Archer heads to the Mexican border to capture a notorious coyote, which is Spanish for coyote.

programme.title: Archer: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Archer and Lana pose as newlyweds to stop a sale of enriched uranium.

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.desc: The Enterprise meets with a Tamarian ship, known for an unusual means of communication. The alien captain abducts Picard to a nearby planet.

programme.desc: Picard struggles to communicate with a mysterious and destructive force.

programme.title: Movie: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: A cab driver is pulled back into a military mission by a former superior to protect a mysterious woman who holds the key to saving Earth. Together, they retrieve four stones that represent the elements in order to stop an entity of pure evil.

programme.title: Movie: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: A cab driver is pulled back into a military mission by a former superior to protect a mysterious woman who holds the key to saving Earth. Together, they retrieve four stones that represent the elements in order to stop an entity of pure evil.

programme.title: Movie: Evolution

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Ensign Ro

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Silicon Avatar
programme.desc: Picard struggles to communicate with a mysterious and destructive force.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: The amazing life story of the most famous elephant to have ever lived: Jumbo. With scientists from around the world, Sir David has unique access to the elephant's skeleton at the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Attenborough's Journey
programme.desc: As Sir David Attenborough enters his 94th year, this unique film presents a remarkable portrait of the man behind the legend.

programme.title: Planet Earth: A Celebration
programme.desc: This program highlights eight of the most extraordinary sequences from 'Planet Earth II' and 'Blue Planet II.' In addition to new narration, the sequences will include an arrangement of original scores from composer Hans Zimmer and Jacob Shea.

programme.title: Life Story: First Steps
programme.desc: Each and every animal is born with a chance to survive, thrive and produce their very own next generation. The first hurdle in life is infancy.

programme.title: Life Story: Growing Up
programme.desc: In the journey towards adulthood, a moment comes for all animals when they must strike out on their own.

programme.title: Life Story: Home
programme.desc: To survive, animals need somewhere to live, a place that provides the necessities of life, shelter from the elements and refuge from enemies.

programme.title: Life Story: Power
programme.desc: An individual's life journey interweaves with many others. Those who are successful know when to fight or back down, when to cooperate or to go it alone and how to manipulate and deceive.

programme.title: Life Story: Courtship
programme.desc: Competition to win a partner has created both the most extraordinary beauty and life-threatening violence found anywhere in nature. The stakes could not be higher: without a mate, the journey of life ends.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey through Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Fish

programme.desc: Find out how wooden barrels, fire hydrants, automotive seats and cathode ray tubes are made.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Pacific Terror
programme.desc: When Detective Molly Daul works two homicides back to back, she realizes she's dealing with a sexual predator who targets trusting young women. Arrested before he can kill again in Seattle, his chilling confession remains with Molly to this day.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Frozen Tears
programme.desc: Pretty pre-teen Rosie Davenport is found brutally murdered in an abandoned house, the circumstances of her death eerily similar to the unsolved murder of 13-year-old Malissa Thomas one year earlier.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Devil at the Crossroads
programme.desc: 11-year-old Shauna Howe disappears as she returns home from a girl scouts Halloween party. When Shauna's body shows up in a local creek, her murder ignites an investigation, whose conclusion will send shockwaves through her community.

programme.title: Relentless: discovery+ Sneak Peek: The Two Christinas
programme.desc: Christina Whittaker, twenty-one, vanishes without a trace, but her mother Cindy refuses to give up hope. Filmmaker Christina Fontana pledges to find the truth about their missing daughter, but as she digs deeper, it's clear nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Disappeared: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: A young man gets life-changing news and drops everything to start a new chapter. But when he never calls home again his family knows something is wrong. Police begin to investigate but encounter a tangled web of contradictory stories.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Serial Confessions
programme.desc: Watch and hear the shocking confession of a real estate agent turned serial killer and a stunning rescue video of a woman held hostage in a shipping container.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: Relentless: discovery+ Sneak Peek: The Two Christinas
programme.desc: Christina Whittaker, twenty-one, vanishes without a trace, but her mother Cindy refuses to give up hope. Filmmaker Christina Fontana pledges to find the truth about their missing daughter, but as she digs deeper, it's clear nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Disappeared: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: A young man gets life-changing news and drops everything to start a new chapter. But when he never calls home again his family knows something is wrong. Police begin to investigate but encounter a tangled web of contradictory stories.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Portrait of a Killer
programme.desc: A teenager said after he killed an elderly couple that 'it felt amazing.' Now a controversial law could set him free at age 25.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Nurse
programme.desc: Bright young nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. An old friend of hers points a finger at Michelle's ex-boyfriend. Cops discover footage that shows Michelle's car driving around the parking lot where she vanished, but who is the driver?

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2014, Kimberly Robertson's battered body is found on a sidewalk after a date with her boyfriend. A network of surveillance cameras plays out Kimberly's last few hours alive. Can CCTV footage help catch her killer?

programme.title: True Conviction: Drive to Kill
programme.desc: Cindy Albrecht, the head chef for one of the racing world's top teams, goes missing from her home near the INDY 500 and as the suspects start piling up it becomes a race against time.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Long Road to Justice
programme.desc: Anna-Sigga Nicolazzi meets the detective and prosecutor who took on the case of Karen Ann Watson, a wife and mother who was brutally stabbed to death. Nearly 30 years after the crime, they track down a killer who thinks he got away with murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures. When investigators discover a trail of purchases made with the victim's credit card, they hope it will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Evil Eye
programme.desc: Not long after Patrick Brown falls for a woman named Cece, he is plagued by mysterious phone calls and a creepy sense that someone is watching him. He begins to wonder if it might be a figment of his imagination.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: I Forgive You
programme.desc: In 2003, a young man in Georgia shoots his father in the head sixteen times. Days later, the dismembered body of a nun turns up on the side of a Virginia road. The story behind these two crimes haunts those involved to this day.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Small Town Secrets
programme.desc: A look back at crime cases where questions remain unanswered.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Web of Spies
programme.desc: When her fairytale marriage crumbles, a young mother questions just what kind of family she married into. A bitter custody battle leads to a vicious cyberstalking campaign with devastating real life consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hunting Ground
programme.desc: Nicole White is in the middle of a bitter custody battle when she vanishes. Suspicion falls on an online date until her husband turns up unexpectedly with his face scratched.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Killing Field
programme.desc: In February, a teenage couple mysteriously disappears leaving two families devastated. When their car turns up abandoned and burnt in a field, everyone's desperate for answers. But winter's thaw reveals the hideous truth that shocks the community.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got the Wrong Four People Killed

programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled

programme.title: Amphibia: Little Frogtown/ Hopping Mall

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium

programme.title: Amphibia: Night Drivers/ Return to Wartwood
programme.desc: Ignoring Anne's and Hop Pop's warnings about the dangers of night driving, Sprig and Polly stay up all night to drive the family home. Then, The Plantar's come up with a plan after learning they forgot to bring gifts.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Shut-In!
programme.desc: In this special extended episode, Anne and the Plantars protect themselves from the dangers of the annual Blue Moon by locking themselves in the house and entertaining each other with the scariest stories they can think of.

programme.title: Amphibia: Ivy on the Run/ After the Rain
programme.desc: Fed up with her mother's strict rules, Ivy devises a plan to run away. Then, Anne asks Hop Pop to retrieve the music box, bringing some long-buried secrets to light.

programme.title: Amphibia: The First Temple
programme.desc: Marcy, Anne and the Plantars travel to an ancient temple that could hold the key to getting Anne and Marcy home, but only if they can survive the temple's deadly challenges.

programme.title: Amphibia: New Wartwood/ Friend or Frobo
programme.desc: Intent on winning over Wartwood, Marcy makes a plan to improve the town. Then, Desperate for fun, Polly breaks out and finds an unlikely new friend in the process.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad to Redemption/ Maddie & Marcy
programme.desc: Mayor Toadstool is offered his dream job but realizes he doesn’t want to leave Wartwood. Maddie is working on an important spell, but her three sisters keep getting in the way.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Oxford
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Brownsville
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Fort Benning
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Bowman
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.desc: Football.

programme.title: SEC Storied: In Search of Derrick Thomas
programme.desc: Derrick Thomas was a legendary college pass rusher and talented linebacker in the NFL before an accident at 33 years old took his life. See how his legacy continues to influence the world years later.

programme.desc: Fallon is poised to become the new COO of her father's company, that is, until she meets her new stepmother, whom her father has chosen over her. Not happy with the outcome, Fallon sidles up to her father's biggest enemy.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Bubble Boy
programme.desc: During a trip to a cabin with George, Susan and Elaine, Jerry agrees to visit a fan who must live in a protective bubble. George gets into a fight with the 'bubble boy' over the correct answer to a Trivial Pursuit question. Kramer starts a fire.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Serenity Now
programme.desc: Frank must say 'serenity now' whenever he feels his blood pressure rise. Kramer installs a screen door outside his apartment. George takes on his rival when his father hires them both to sell computers. Jerry's girlfriend comments on his lack of emotion.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Putting Swim Fins on a Cat
programme.desc: Charlie has to find creative ways to entertain his girlfriend's four-year-old son while Alan becomes a human guinea pig.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something My Gynecologist Said
programme.desc: Alan is hesitant to make a serious commitment to Lyndsey but gets inspiration from an unlikely source. Meanwhile, Walden enjoys being a boy-toy for a rich older woman.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: It's Adam's 16th birthday, but his parents are too distracted by Barry and Lainey's engagement and Erica's band ambitions to remember their youngest son's big day.

programme.title: Mom: Too Many Hippies and Huevos Rancheros
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie rally around Marjorie when her husband has a stroke.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Although Mike is thrown for a loop when he meets his new neighbours, a loving lesbian couple, he is impressed with the similar interests he shares with one of the women.
